title: JxstCris Format PVP
body:

**first of all, thank u all for 5k download!!! :D**

 

# JxstCris Format PVP
 

### Mainly features :

- Simple blocks
- Custom items
- Comfy GUI for PVP
- Custom icons and crosshair
- Armors texture from 1.16
- Custom Sky
- Custo particles
![items in example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2c6382349b318fa30172346cdc29d38eecac4b4.png)
